docs:
# Spinner
Animated loading indicator in three sizes.
## Import
```tsx
import { Spinner } from "@/components/ui/spinner";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<Spinner size="md" title={undefined} description={undefined} actionLabel={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **size** (string) — default: `"md"`: Size
- **title** (string): Title
- **description** (string): Description
- **actionLabel** (string): Action label
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add spinner
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/spinner
```
